sentences.target: J'ouvre le flacon sur le lavabo.

translations.fr: J'ouvre le flacon sur le lavabo.
translations.en: I'm opening the small bottle on the sink.
translations.es: Estoy abriendo el frasco pequeño sobre el lavabo.
translations.de: Ich öffne das Fläschchen auf dem Waschbecken.
translations.it: Sto aprendo il flaconcino sul lavandino.
translations.ko: 세면대 위에서 작은 병을 열고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我正在洗手台上打开小瓶子。
translations.yue: 我喺洗手盤上面打開個細樽。
translations.ru: Я открываю маленький флакон на раковине.
translations.pt: Estou abrindo o frasco pequeno em cima do lavatório.
translations.he: אני פותח את הבקבוקון על הכיור.
translations.vi: Tôi đang mở chai nhỏ trên bồn rửa.
translations.nl: Ik maak het flesje open op de wastafel.
translations.uk: Я відкриваю маленький флакон на умивальнику.
translations.hu: Kinyitom a kis üvegcsét a mosdón.
translations.hi: मैं वॉशबेसिन पर छोटी बोतल खोल रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Ανοίγω το μικρό μπουκαλάκι πάνω στον νιπτήρα.
translations.nb: Jeg åpner den lille flasken på servanten.
translations.id: Aku membuka botol kecil di atas wastafel.
translations.sv: Jag öppnar den lilla flaskan på handfatet.
translations.da: Jeg åbner den lille flaske på håndvasken.
translations.ja: 洗面台の上で小瓶を開けている。

tokens.explanation: Main verb (present indicative, 1st person singular) with attached elided subject clitic 'je'; transitive, taking 'le flacon' as direct object.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'flacon'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'ouvre'.
Preposition introducing a locative prepositional phrase 'sur le lavabo'.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'lavabo'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'sur' (location).

sentences.target: Tu poses le flacon sur la table.
sentences.reading: /ty poz lə flakɔ̃ syʁ la tabl/

translations.fr: Tu poses le flacon sur la table.
translations.ipa: /ty poz lə flakɔ̃ syʁ la tabl/
translations.en: You're putting the small bottle on the table.
translations.es: Pones el frasco pequeño sobre la mesa.
translations.de: Du stellst das Fläschchen auf den Tisch.
translations.ko: 테이블 위에 작은 병을 올려놓고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 你把小瓶子放在桌子上。
translations.yue: 你將個細樽擺喺枱上面。
translations.ru: Ты ставишь маленький флакон на стол.
translations.pt: Você coloca o frasco pequeno sobre a mesa.
translations.he: אתה מניח את הבקבוקון על השולחן.
translations.vi: Bạn đặt chai nhỏ lên bàn.
translations.ar: أنت تضع الزجاجة الصغيرة على الطاولة.
translations.nl: Je zet het flesje op tafel.
translations.uk: Ти ставиш маленький флакон на стіл.
translations.hu: A kis üvegcsét az asztalra teszed.
translations.hi: तुम छोटी बोतल मेज़ पर रख रहे हो.
translations.el: Βάζεις το μικρό μπουκαλάκι πάνω στο τραπέζι.
translations.nb: Du setter den lille flasken på bordet.
translations.id: Kamu meletakkan botol kecil di atas meja.
translations.sv: Du ställer den lilla flaskan på bordet.
translations.da: Du sætter den lille flaske på bordet.
translations.ja: 小瓶をテーブルの上に置いている。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 2nd person singular; subject of 'poses'.
Main verb (present indicative, 2nd person singular); transitive, selecting 'le flacon' as direct object.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'flacon'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'poses'.
Preposition introducing a locative prepositional phrase 'sur la table'.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'table'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'sur' (location).

translations.en: This small bottle smells like vanilla.
translations.es: Este frasco pequeño huele a vainilla.
translations.ko: 이 작은 병은 바닐라 향이 나요.
translations.zh-Hans: 这个小瓶子闻起来有香草味。
translations.pt: Este frasco pequeno cheira a baunilha.
translations.tr: Bu küçük şişe vanilya gibi kokuyor.
translations.vi: Chai nhỏ này có mùi vani.
translations.ar: هذه الزجاجة الصغيرة تفوح برائحة الفانيليا.
translations.hi: यह छोटी बोतल वनीला जैसी महकती है.
translations.el: Αυτό το μικρό μπουκαλάκι μυρίζει βανίλια.
translations.sv: Den här lilla flaskan luktar vanilj.
translations.cs: Tato malá lahvička voní po vanilce.
translations.da: Denne lille flaske dufter af vanilje.
translations.ja: この小瓶はバニラの香りがする。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; modifies 'flacon'.
Common noun, masculine singular; subject of 'sent'.
Main verb (present indicative, 3rd person singular); takes 'la vanille' as its complement (direct object).
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'vanille'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object complement of 'sent'.

sentences.target: On a cassé le flacon hier.

translations.fr: On a cassé le flacon hier.
translations.en: We broke the small bottle yesterday.
translations.de: Wir haben das Fläschchen gestern zerbrochen.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们昨天把小瓶子打碎了。
translations.yue: 我哋琴日打爛咗個細樽。
translations.pt: Nós quebramos o frasco pequeno ontem.
translations.vi: Hôm qua chúng tôi làm vỡ chai nhỏ.
translations.nl: We hebben het flesje gisteren stukgemaakt.
translations.hi: हमने कल छोटी बोतल तोड़ दी.
translations.nb: Vi knuste den lille flasken i går.
translations.id: Kemarin kami memecahkan botol kecil itu.
translations.sv: Vi krossade den lilla flaskan i går.
translations.da: Vi knuste den lille flaske i går.

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/personal subject pronoun (colloquially 'we'), 3rd person singular; subject of the compound verb.
Auxiliary (present indicative, 3rd person singular) forming the passé composé with 'cassé'.
Past participle of 'casser' (invariable here); lexical verb in compound tense; transitive, selecting 'le flacon' as direct object.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'flacon'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'a cassé'.
Temporal adverb modifying the predicate; indicates when the action occurred.
